customer_reviews: Great product but the onboarding took forever to figure out. Wish there was a better getting-started guide.
We doubled our email open rates in the first month. The segmentation tools are incredibly powerful.
Support is slow to respond. Had a critical issue take 3 days to resolve. Almost churned because of it.
content_brief: Write content explaining how AI agents can automate the full B2B marketing funnel. Target audience: marketing directors at 50-500 person SaaS companies. Goal: generate demo requests. Primary keyword: 'AI marketing automation'. CTA: Book a free strategy call.

leads.name: Sarah Chen
